description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nicosingh/rpi-dind:latest Docker image and two stages: build-branch and build-master. Define variables DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME, DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY, GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME, and GITLAB_REGISTRY as provided. Add a branch-docker_hub job in the build-branch stage that runs on rpi runners, excludes the master branch, and executes: docker login -u nicosingh -p $DOCKERHUB_NICOSINGH_PASSWORD $DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY; docker build -t $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .; docker push $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a branch-gitlab job in the same stage, also excluded from master, that runs: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $GITLAB_REGISTRY; docker build -t $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .; docker push $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a master-docker_hub job in the build-master stage that runs only on the master branch, uses the same rpi tag, and runs: docker login -u nicosingh -p $DOCKERHUB_NICOSINGH_PASSWORD $DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY; docker build -t $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:latest .; docker push $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:latest. Finally, add a master-gitlab job in the build-master stage that runs only on master and executes: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $GITLAB_REGISTRY; docker build -t $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:latest .; docker push $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:latest.
